title: Admin - View Vendor Lists by Status - Functional Test Plan
author: QA Automation
overview: Functional testing of the Admin Vendor Lists by Status feature on the AT/AD Admin Portal. Covers status tab navigation (Pending Approval, Active Partners, Inactive Partners, Rejected Partners), vendor card display fields (name, type, location, contact details, product count), tab count accuracy, data consistency validation, and accessibility.

inScope: Status tabs visibility and navigation (Pending Approval, Active Partners, Inactive Partners, Rejected Partners)
Vendor card display fields: name, type, location, contact details, product count
Tab count accuracy for each status
Tab switching behavior and content loading
Data consistency — vendors appear in correct tabs
Accessibility of tabs and vendor cards
outOfScope: Partner Management Dashboard metrics (covered by SCRUM-466)
Search or text-based filtering within tabs
Auto-refresh or refresh prompt when vendor status changes (requires backend API manipulation)
Empty state message when no vendors exist in a tab (requires empty environment)
Vendor type verification across all types (requires specific vendor types in environment)

relatedStories: SCRUM-466 - View Partner Management Dashboard (navigation context)

prerequisites: Admin is signed in to the Admin Portal
Vendors exist in various statuses: Pending, Active, Inactive, Rejected

testCases.title: Verify all four status tabs are visible on the vendor list page
testCases.acceptanceCriteria: AC1 - Tabs available: Pending Approval, Active Partners, Inactive Partners, Rejected Partners
testCases.preconditions: Admin is signed in and on the vendor list page
steps: Navigate to the vendor list page
Verify the Pending Approval tab is visible
Verify the Active Partners tab is visible
Verify the Inactive Partners tab is visible
Verify the Rejected Partners tab is visible
expectedResults: Pending Approval tab is visible with label
Active Partners tab is visible with label
Inactive Partners tab is visible with label
Rejected Partners tab is visible with label

testCases.title: Verify Pending Approval tab displays vendor cards with correct fields
testCases.acceptanceCriteria: AC1 - Tabs; AC2 - Vendor card fields
testCases.preconditions: Admin is on the vendor list page and pending vendors exist
steps: Click the Pending Approval tab
Verify vendor cards are displayed
For each vendor card, verify vendor name is shown
Verify vendor type is shown (Manufacturer / Distributor / Service Provider)
Verify location is shown
Verify contact details are shown
Verify product count is shown
expectedResults: Each card displays the vendor name
Each card displays the vendor type
Each card displays the vendor location
Each card displays the product count
testCases.postconditions: Pending vendor cards display all required fields

testCases.title: Verify Active Partners tab displays vendor cards with correct fields
testCases.acceptanceCriteria: AC1 - Tabs; AC2 - Vendor card fields
testCases.preconditions: Admin is on the vendor list page and active vendors exist
steps: Click the Active Partners tab
Verify vendor cards are displayed
For each vendor card, verify vendor name is shown
Verify vendor type is shown
Verify location is shown
Verify contact details are shown
Verify product count is shown
expectedResults: Each card displays the vendor name
Each card displays the vendor type
Each card displays the vendor location
Each card displays the product count
testCases.postconditions: Active vendor cards display all required fields

testCases.title: Verify Inactive Partners tab displays vendor cards with correct fields
testCases.acceptanceCriteria: AC1 - Tabs; AC2 - Vendor card fields
testCases.preconditions: Admin is on the vendor list page and inactive vendors exist
steps: Click the Inactive Partners tab
Verify vendor cards are displayed
For each vendor card, verify vendor name is shown
Verify vendor type is shown
Verify location is shown
Verify contact details are shown
Verify product count is shown
expectedResults: Each card displays the vendor name
Each card displays the vendor type
Each card displays the vendor location
Each card displays the product count
testCases.postconditions: Inactive vendor cards display all required fields

testCases.title: Verify Rejected Partners tab displays vendor cards with correct fields
testCases.acceptanceCriteria: AC1 - Tabs; AC2 - Vendor card fields
testCases.preconditions: Admin is on the vendor list page and rejected vendors exist
steps: Click the Rejected Partners tab
Verify vendor cards are displayed
For each vendor card, verify vendor name is shown
Verify vendor type is shown
Verify location is shown
Verify contact details are shown
Verify product count is shown
expectedResults: Each card displays the vendor name
Each card displays the vendor type
Each card displays the vendor location
Each card displays the product count
testCases.postconditions: Rejected vendor cards display all required fields

testCases.title: Verify correct count appears on the Pending Approval tab
testCases.acceptanceCriteria: AC3 - Correct count appears on each tab
testCases.preconditions: Admin is on the vendor list page and pending vendors exist
steps: Observe the count displayed on the Pending Approval tab
Click the Pending Approval tab
Count the number of vendor cards displayed
Compare the tab count with the actual number of cards
expectedResults: Tab count matches the number of vendor cards displayed
testCases.postconditions: Pending Approval tab count is accurate

testCases.title: Verify correct count appears on the Active Partners tab
testCases.acceptanceCriteria: AC3 - Correct count appears on each tab
testCases.preconditions: Admin is on the vendor list page and active vendors exist
steps: Observe the count displayed on the Active Partners tab
Click the Active Partners tab
Count the number of vendor cards displayed
Compare the tab count with the actual number of cards
expectedResults: Tab count matches the number of vendor cards displayed
testCases.postconditions: Active Partners tab count is accurate

testCases.title: Verify correct count appears on the Inactive Partners tab
testCases.acceptanceCriteria: AC3 - Correct count appears on each tab
testCases.preconditions: Admin is on the vendor list page and inactive vendors exist
steps: Observe the count displayed on the Inactive Partners tab
Click the Inactive Partners tab
Count the number of vendor cards displayed
Compare the tab count with the actual number of cards
expectedResults: Tab count matches the number of vendor cards displayed
testCases.postconditions: Inactive Partners tab count is accurate

testCases.title: Verify correct count appears on the Rejected Partners tab
testCases.acceptanceCriteria: AC3 - Correct count appears on each tab
testCases.preconditions: Admin is on the vendor list page and rejected vendors exist
steps: Observe the count displayed on the Rejected Partners tab
Click the Rejected Partners tab
Count the number of vendor cards displayed
Compare the tab count with the actual number of cards
expectedResults: Tab count matches the number of vendor cards displayed
testCases.postconditions: Rejected Partners tab count is accurate

testCases.title: Verify tab switching loads correct vendor list
testCases.preconditions: Admin is on the vendor list page with vendors in multiple statuses
steps: Click the Pending Approval tab and note the vendors shown
Click the Active Partners tab and note the vendors shown
Click the Inactive Partners tab and note the vendors shown
Click the Rejected Partners tab and note the vendors shown
Switch back to Pending Approval tab
Verify the same vendors from step 1 are displayed
expectedResults: Active vendors are displayed (different from pending)
Same pending vendors are displayed consistently
testCases.postconditions: Tab switching works correctly and consistently

testCases.title: Verify vendor does not appear in multiple tabs simultaneously
testCases.acceptanceCriteria: Edge Case - Vendor appears in incorrect tab → data consistency validation
testCases.preconditions: Admin is on the vendor list page with vendors in various statuses
steps: Click the Pending Approval tab and note all vendor names
Click the Active Partners tab and note all vendor names
Click the Inactive Partners tab and note all vendor names
Click the Rejected Partners tab and note all vendor names
Cross-check that no vendor name appears in more than one tab
expectedResults: No vendor appears in more than one tab — each vendor is in exactly one status tab
testCases.postconditions: Data consistency is verified across tabs

testCases.title: Verify vendor card contact details are displayed correctly
testCases.acceptanceCriteria: AC2 - Vendor card displays contact details
testCases.preconditions: Admin is on a tab with vendor cards
steps: Navigate to a tab with vendors
Locate a vendor card
Verify contact details include email or phone or both
Verify contact details are not empty or placeholder text
expectedResults: Contact details contain actual data, not placeholders

testCases.title: Verify vendor card product count reflects actual products
testCases.acceptanceCriteria: AC2 - Vendor card displays product count
testCases.preconditions: Admin is on a tab with vendor cards and product count is known for a vendor
steps: Navigate to a tab with vendors
Locate a vendor card with known product count
Verify the displayed product count matches the actual number of products for that vendor
expectedResults: Product count on the card matches the actual product count from backend

testCases.title: Verify tabs support keyboard navigation
testCases.preconditions: Admin is on the vendor list page
steps: Use Tab key to focus on the tab bar
Use Arrow keys to navigate between tabs
Press Enter or Space to select a tab
Verify the selected tab content loads
Tab into the vendor cards area
Verify vendor cards are focusable
expectedResults: Vendor cards area is reachable via keyboard
Vendor cards receive focus with visible indicators
testCases.postconditions: Tabs and cards are keyboard navigable

testCases.title: Verify tabs and vendor cards have accessible labels for screen readers
testCases.preconditions: Admin is on the vendor list page
steps: Inspect tab elements for role='tab' and aria-selected attributes
Verify each tab has an accessible name including the count
Inspect vendor cards for accessible structure
Verify card content is readable by screen readers
expectedResults: Tabs have proper ARIA roles (tablist, tab, tabpanel)
Each tab has an accessible name (e.g., 'Pending Approval (5)')
Screen reader can announce vendor card details

testCases.title: Verify default tab selection on page load
testCases.preconditions: Admin navigates to the vendor list page for the first time
steps: Navigate to the vendor list page
Observe which tab is selected by default
Verify the default tab content is loaded
expectedResults: A default tab is selected (likely Pending Approval or first tab)
The default tab's vendor cards are displayed
testCases.postconditions: Default tab is selected and content is loaded

testCases.title: Verify complete vendor list by status flow end-to-end
testCases.acceptanceCriteria: AC1-AC3 and Edge Cases - Complete Flow
testCases.preconditions: Admin is signed in and vendors exist in all four statuses
steps: Log in to the Admin Portal
Navigate to the vendor list page
Verify all four tabs are visible with counts
Click Pending Approval tab — verify vendor cards with all fields
Click Active Partners tab — verify vendor cards with all fields
Click Inactive Partners tab — verify vendor cards with all fields
Click Rejected Partners tab — verify vendor cards with all fields
Verify no vendor appears in multiple tabs
Verify tab counts match the number of cards in each tab
expectedResults: All four tabs are visible with numeric counts
Pending vendor cards show name, type, location, contact, product count
Active vendor cards show name, type, location, contact, product count
Inactive vendor cards show name, type, location, contact, product count
Rejected vendor cards show name, type, location, contact, product count
No vendor appears in more than one tab
testCases.postconditions: Full vendor list by status flow is verified

vendorData: Vendors in Pending Approval status (at least 2)
Vendors with known product counts for accuracy verification

assumptions: Admin Portal is accessible and admin sign-in works (SCRUM-442)
Vendor list page is reachable from admin navigation
Vendors can be in exactly one status at a time
Tab counts include all vendors in that status (no pagination affecting the count)
risks: Pagination behavior for tabs with many vendors is not defined in the story
Default tab selection on page load is not specified
openQuestions: Which tab is selected by default when the vendor list page loads?
Is there pagination within each tab, and if so, does the tab count reflect total or current page?
Are vendor cards clickable to navigate to a vendor detail view?
Is there a search or filter within each tab?

Note: Description was updated on 2026-04-15 — tabs changed from 'All Vendors' to 'Inactive Partners / Rejected Partners', and 'Status badge' was removed from vendor card fields. Confirm these changes are intentional.
notesFromChangelog: Description updated 2026-04-15 (first revision): Tabs changed from 'Pending Approval, Active Partners, All Vendors' to 'Pending Approval, Active Partners, Inactive Partners, Rejected Partners'.
Description updated 2026-04-15 (second revision): 'Status badge' removed from vendor card display fields.

Test cases TC_SCRUM469_006 (vendor type verification), TC_SCRUM469_013-019 (auto-refresh, tab counts after approval, empty states, zero count tabs) were removed as they require backend API manipulation or empty environment conditions that are not automatable.
